# KeychainPGP

> Simple, cross-platform OpenPGP encryption for your clipboard.

KeychainPGP is a free, open-source desktop and mobile application that makes PGP encryption accessible to everyone through a clipboard-first workflow.

## Overview

- **What**: PGP encryption/decryption tool with a clipboard-first workflow
- **Platforms**: Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, Web
- **License**: MIT / Apache-2.0
- **Tech**: Rust, Tauri v2, Svelte 5, Sequoia-PGP
- **Crypto**: Ed25519 + X25519 (modern, zero-config)
- **Website**: https://keychainpgp.org
- **Web App**: https://keychainpgp.github.io
- **Source**: https://github.com/keychainpgp/keychainpgp
- **Downloads**: https://github.com/keychainpgp/keychainpgp/releases

## Key Features

- Clipboard-first: Copy text → Encrypt → Paste encrypted message
- Global hotkeys: Ctrl+Shift+E (encrypt), Ctrl+Shift+D (decrypt)
- Modern crypto: Ed25519 + X25519 keys, no configuration needed
- Cross-platform: Windows (.msi/.exe), macOS (.dmg), Linux (.deb/.AppImage), Android (.apk)
- Web app: WASM-based, runs entirely in the browser
- OPSEC mode: Window title masking, RAM-only keys, panic wipe
- i18n: 20 languages supported
- System tray with auto-clear clipboard (30s)
- No telemetry, no tracking, no accounts

## Documentation

- [Full details](https://keychainpgp.org/llms-full.txt)
